name: Dick Griffin
abstract: James "Dick" Richard Griffin (born January 28, 1940, in Jackson, Mississippi) is an American jazz trombonist known for his work on Strata-East Records, and with Rahsaan Roland Kirk and Sun Ra. As a child he studied piano, soon switching to trombone.

interviews.title: Dick Griffin interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, February 12, 2024

about_quotes.speaker: Frank Foster
about_quotes.evidence: Dick Griffin on trombone. This was an attempt to make a statement... except a couple who were pictured here: ... Dick Griffin on trombone.
about_quotes.doc_title: Frank Foster — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History
